# CLAUDE.md

> Generated by `mind-ontology emit` from `.agentctx/` — **do not hand-edit.**
> Claude Code reads this file as project memory. Edit the source files and
> re-run `mind-ontology emit`. Agents get richer, task-scoped context from
> the live `agentctx` MCP server (`get_context` / `list_constraints`).
> If your tooling also loads `AGENTS.md`, the two files carry identical
> payloads — keep whichever your tools read and re-emit only that target.

## Constraints

### Fail closed on missing context <!-- (from .agentctx/constraints.md) -->
If a required ontology source is missing or empty, stop and report instead of
guessing. Never act on a partially loaded ontology.
